name: SMITH MIDLAND CORP
summary: Smith-Midland Corporation invents, develops, manufactures, markets, leases, licenses, sells, and installs precast concrete products through six wholly-owned subsidiaries. Key products include SlenderWall lightweight exterior wall panels, J-J Hooks Highway Safety Barrier, Sierra Wall sound barriers, Easi-Set and Easi-Span precast buildings, and SoftSound sound-absorptive finish. The company serves construction, highway, utilities, and farming industries, primarily in the Mid-Atlantic, Northeastern, Midwestern, and Southeastern United States, and licenses products internationally.

products.name: SlenderWall
products.description: Patented lightweight prefabricated energy-efficient exterior concrete and steel cladding system for building construction.

products.name: J-J Hooks Highway Safety Barrier
products.description: Patented positively connected highway safety barrier for roadways, sold, rented, and licensed.

products.name: Sierra Wall
products.description: Patented precast concrete sound and sight barrier for highway, residential, and commercial use.

products.name: SoftSound
products.description: Proprietary sound absorptive finish applied to sound barriers to absorb traffic noise.

products.name: Easi-Set Precast Buildings
products.description: Transportable prefabricated all-concrete buildings available in 38 standard sizes for various uses.

products.name: Easi-Span Expandable Precast Buildings
products.description: Modular expandable precast concrete buildings incorporating Easi-Set technology in larger configurations.

products.name: Farm Products
products.description: Precast concrete farm products including cattleguards, water troughs, and feed troughs.

partnerships.description: Virginia subsidiary doing business as Easi-Set Worldwide, licensing proprietary products to precast manufacturers nationwide and internationally.
